name: Divine rune pouch
rationale: Holds runes for spellcasting -> Mage; drop Runecraft/Slayer.

name: Eye of the corruptor

name: Masori crafting kit
rationale: Cosmetic recolour kit for Ava's assembler -> Cosmetics; drop Range (kit is not the gear). [rep: ornament kits]

name: Adventurer's top (t3)
rationale: Quest Speedrunning cosmetic outfit -> Cosmetics; drop Agility + Thieving.

name: Ghommal's avernic defender 5
rationale: Avernic defender (melee offhand) + Ghommal's hilt 5 (teleport) -> Melee, Teleports; drop Cosmetics.

name: Webweaver bow
rationale: Wilderness-boss Ranged weapon -> Range; drop Slayer (Wilderness bosses are not slayer tasks). [rep: wildy bosses]

rationale: Callisto drop, upgrades Viggora's chainmace (Melee) -> Melee; drop Slayer (Wilderness boss).

name: Ore pack

name: Special cake
rationale: 2023 Birthday event item -> Cosmetics; drop Misc (event-item family).

rationale: Easter event fun-weapon reward -> Cosmetics; drop Melee (novelty).

name: Anima-infused bark

name: Forestry top

name: Black felling axe
rationale: Woodcutting felling axe -> Woodcutting + Firemaking; drop Melee (skilling-tool rule). [rep: felling axes]

name: Bellator vestige

name: Venator ring

name: Eye of the duke
rationale: Soulreaper axe (melee) component -> Melee; drop Slayer. [rep: soulreaper parts]

name: Ring of shadows (uncharged)
rationale: DT2 all-style offensive ring + teleport hub -> Mage, Melee, Range, Teleports; drop Misc/Quests.

name: Strangled tablet
rationale: Unlocks a ring-of-shadows teleport -> Teleports; drop Misc. [rep: RoS teleport tablets]

name: Ancient blood ornament kit
rationale: Cosmetic recolour kit for Torva armour -> Cosmetics; drop Melee.

name: Sigil of the alchemaniac
rationale: Deadman Mode auto-alchemy (Magic) sigil -> Mage; drop Misc. [rep: Deadman sigils]

name: Sigil of the infernal chef
rationale: Deadman Mode sigil: instant-cooks caught fish -> Cooking, Fishing; drop Misc.

name: Sigil of woodcraft
rationale: Deadman sigil: chopping trees yields planks -> Woodcutting + Firemaking, Construction; drop mis-tagged Fletching/Misc.

name: Pheasant boots
rationale: Forestry-event (Woodcutting) cosmetic costume -> Woodcutting + Firemaking, Cosmetics; add WC+FM for set consistency.

name: Trailblazer reloaded bulwark ornament kit
rationale: Cosmetic recolour kit for Dinh's bulwark -> Cosmetics; drop Melee (kit is not the gear).

name: Trailblazer reloaded rejuvenation pool scroll
rationale: Cosmetic recolour for the POH ornate rejuvenation pool -> Cosmetics; drop Construction (scroll is a skin, not the build) per ornament-kit rule.

name: Globetrotter pendant
rationale: Leagues multi-destination teleport pendant -> Teleports.

name: Kourend castle teleport
rationale: Magic teleport tablet to Kourend Castle -> Teleports. [rep: city teleport tablets]

name: Scurrius' spine
rationale: JUDGMENT CALL: boss-drop ingredient combined via Smithing (mace), Fletching (bow), Crafting (staff) -> all three production skills (cf. broken-zombie-axe input precedent). Finished spine weapons (bone mace/bow/staff) kept combat-only. Confirm direction.

name: Rum
rationale: Tavern drink / salvage junk with no combat use -> Misc; dropped Melee mis-tag.

name: Sunfire splinters
rationale: Charges Dizana's quiver/Tonalztics (Range) and is consumed to make sunfire runes (Runecraft) -> added Runecraft. Confirm.

name: Quetzin
rationale: Hunters' Rumours (Hunter activity) skilling pet -> Cosmetics, Hunter (skilling-pet rule).

name: Enchanted water talisman
rationale: Inert Perilous Moons quest talisman (puzzle item, not used at an altar) -> Quests; dropped Runecraft.

name: Calcified moth
rationale: Single-use teleport to Cam Torum -> Teleports.

name: Raw pyre fox
rationale: Hunter meat, cookable -> Cooking, Hunter; dropped erroneous Fishing tag (source mis-tag). Also Raw moonlight antelope.

name: Cooked dashing kebbit
rationale: Cooked hunter-meat food -> Cooking, Hunter; dropped Melee (food, not a melee item). Applies to several cooked meats.

name: Sunlight antelope antler
rationale: Hunter drop used in Fletching (crossbow/bolts) -> Fletching, Hunter; dropped Range (antler is a material, not ranged gear). Also moonlight antler.

name: Basic quetzal whistle
rationale: JUDGMENT CALL: Quetzal Transport System teleport device -> Teleports; dropped Hunter/Misc (crafted at the Hunter guild but its function is teleport). Confirm whether to retain Hunter.

name: Mixed hide boots
rationale: Hunter Guild ranged armour -> Crafting, Hunter, Range; added Hunter for set consistency (other pieces had it).

name: Small meat pouch
rationale: Crafted (35 Crafting) storage for hunter meat -> added Crafting. Applies to the meat/fur pouch family.

name: Tormented synapse
rationale: JUDGMENT CALL: rare TD ingredient forging emberlight (Smithing), scorching bow (Fletching), purging staff (Crafting/Smithing) -> production skills (same pattern as Scurrius' spine). Possible Slayer. Confirm.

name: Armageddon cape fabric
rationale: Applies a cosmetic Deadman theme to god capes -> Cosmetics; dropped Mage (applicator, not the cape) per ornament-kit rule.

name: Blighted overload (4)
rationale: Deadman overload boosting all combat stats -> Herblore, Mage, Melee, Range (all-style potion rule); added Mage/Range.

name: Jar of venom
rationale: Araxxor boss-lair display jar (Achievement Gallery / POH) -> Construction (jar-family rule).

name: Extended anti-venom+(2)
rationale: Anti-venom/poison cure potion -> Herblore; dropped Melee mis-tag (other doses were Herblore only).

name: Blue moon helm
rationale: LMS magic blue-moon helm -> Mage, Misc; corrected Melee mis-tag (Blue Moon is the Magic set).

name: Pendant of ates
rationale: Chargeable amulet teleporting to six Varlamore locations -> Teleports.

name: Graceful crafting kit
rationale: Cosmetic recolour applicator for graceful -> Cosmetics; dropped Agility + Thieving (applicator, not the gear) per ornament-kit rule.

name: Aldarin teleport
rationale: Magic tablet teleporting to the Aldarin house portal -> Teleports.

name: Infernal pickaxe (or)
rationale: Infernal pickaxe (Mining tool / melee weapon) -> added Melee to match the uncharged variant.

name: Bone mace
rationale: JUDGMENT CALL (no change): Scurrius'-spine melee weapon smithed at an anvil. Kept combat-only (zombie-axe precedent) while the spine ingredient got the production skills. Confirm finished smithed/fletched weapons stay combat-only.

name: Tecu salamander
rationale: JUDGMENT CALL (no change): salamander caught via Hunter, used as a tar weapon. Kept Hunter, Range; salamanders are tri-style (Magic/Melee/Range) - confirm whether to add Mage/Melee.

name: Sunlight moth mix (2)
rationale: JUDGMENT CALL (no change): Hunter butterfly/moth mix that restores stats+HP (not a melee boost). Confirm whether heal/restore mixes should keep Melee.

name: Sunbeam ale
rationale: JUDGMENT CALL (no change): skill-boost ale (boosts Agility+Strength). Preserved source tags. Confirm whether skill-boost brews belong in the boosted-skill tab or Misc.

name: Prescription goggles
rationale: JUDGMENT CALL (no change): Mixology alchemist's XP-boost outfit piece. Confirm whether skilling-XP outfits belong in the skill tab or Cosmetics (inputs-only rule suggests Cosmetics).

name: Sigil of the adroit
rationale: JUDGMENT CALL (no change): Deadman sigil giving accuracy in ALL styles but tagged Melee. Sigil of meticulousness (same all-style effect) is Misc. Confirm consistency.

name: Aranea boots
rationale: JUDGMENT CALL (no change): araxyte tribrid boots (magic/ranged/melee bonuses) tagged Range, Slayer. Confirm whether to add Mage/Melee.

name: Amulet of the monarchs
rationale: JUDGMENT CALL (no change): Grid Master all-style amulet (+30 every style) tagged Melee, Misc. Confirm whether all-style accessories (also emperor ring, thousand-dragon ward, gloves of the damned) should be Mage/Melee/Range.

name: Pheasant cape
rationale: Sanity row: Forestry-event Woodcutting cosmetic costume -> Woodcutting + Firemaking, Cosmetics.

name: Blood moon chestplate
rationale: Sanity row: Blood Moon (Lunar Chest) melee armour -> Melee.

name: Blessed dragon bones
rationale: Sanity row: Ralos blessed-bone Prayer method -> Prayer.

name: Mixalot
rationale: Sanity row: Varlamorian Mixology potion -> Herblore.
